summary: Iteration 94: Testing new Directed Studio features - StudioProductionBanner, real-time scene video preview, time estimates, delete/resume buttons, and ElevenLabs voice narration. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified DirectedStudio component loads correctly with project list, new project button, and campaign type selector.
critical_code_review_comments: StudioProductionContext.jsx: Properly implements global production tracking with polling, startTracking, stopTracking, and dismiss functions
StudioProductionBanner.jsx: Correctly shows progress, phase labels, scene indicators, and 'Ver Filme' button when production completes
DirectedStudio.jsx: Scene preview video elements have data-testid='scene-preview-{num}' for testing
DirectedStudio.jsx: Time estimate shown during video generation phase (~8 min per batch of 3 scenes)
studio.py: GET /api/studio/voices returns 24 ElevenLabs voices with id, name, gender, accent, style
studio.py: DELETE /api/studio/projects/{id} correctly removes project and returns 404 on subsequent access
studio.py: GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status includes narrations, narration_status, voice_config fields
studio.py: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/generate-narration validates scenes exist (returns 400 if no scenes)
google.py: GET /api/google/connect returns authorization_url with dynamic redirect_uri
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed projects for API testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Directed Studio accessed via /marketing/studio then clicking 'Estúdio' campaign type button (data-testid='campaign-type-directed_studio'). StudioProductionBanner only shows when activeProduction exists in StudioProductionContext (requires starting a production). Scene previews (data-testid='scene-preview-{num}') appear in Step 3 when videos complete. Time estimate shown during video generation phase. Test user has 0 projects in DirectedStudio - need to create a project to test full flow.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/studio/voices: PASS - Returns 24 voices with required fields (id, name, gender, accent, style)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/studio/projects: PASS - Creates project with id and draft status
backend_api_tests.GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status: PASS - Returns status with narrations, narration_status, voice_config
backend_api_tests.DELETE /api/studio/projects/{id}: PASS - Deletes project, returns 404 on subsequent access
backend_api_tests.GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status (co: PASS - Returns video outputs for completed projects

frontend_ui_tests.Login flow: PASS - Login with test credentials works

code_review.StudioProductionContext: VERIFIED - Global context with polling, startTracking, stopTracking
code_review.StudioProductionBanner: VERIFIED - Shows progress, phase labels, minimize button, 'Ver Filme' button
code_review.Time estimate: VERIFIED - Shows ~8 min per batch of 3 scenes during video generation
